events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the open stud bays at floor transitions with no fireblocking installed **fail** IRC R302.11 (fireblocking required at floor-level concealed spaces in stud walls). This is a high-risk, non-compliant/installed-defective condition — correctable now at rough-complete stage, but must be resolved and re-inspected before wall closure to avoid concealing a fire/smoke spread path.
